items.title: You could buy two copies of GTA 6 for the price of setting up GTA Online's new Heist from scratch
items.summary: There are some pricy prerequisites to hosting GTA Online's Kortz Center Heist

items.title: Rockstar Should Charge $200 for GTA 6, Analyst Says, as It'll Be 'The Last Great Game' Before Everything is Built Using AI
items.summary: Rockstar's $80 price for Grand Theft Auto 6 is less than half what the game is worth, one analyst has suggested.

items.title: LA Noire Could Have Featured A Different, Very Famous, And More Expensive Lead Actor
items.summary: The 2011 detective game LA Noire, which was published by GTA company Rockstar Games, starred Mad Men actor Aaron Staton as the lead character, Cole Phelps. A writer on the game has now revealed that a different Mad Men actor, Jon Hamm, was considered for the role as well. Staton portrayed Ken Cosgrove on Mad Men, wi…
